title: Nested Headings Deep: Hierarchy Test
purpose: Exercise heading hierarchy preservation across three depth levels (\section / \subsection / \subsubsection). Directly tests Sprint 2's MinerU-flattens-headings hypothesis by providing a deliberately authored hierarchy with 9 headings at known depths.
ground_truth_basis: source.tex (authored deterministically) + visual spot-check of source.pdf (verified 2026-04-22). Source-anchored ground truth reliable here because rendering pipeline is stock article.cls.

files.probes.json: 10 probes by construction (3 content presence, 4 hierarchy, 1 absolute depth, 2 hallucination)
